calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Continued To Nov-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Adobe Inc And Tubemogul Inc Motion For Default Judgment By Court; Memorandum Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by Brenda Crow, CSR#10503 , 415-551-0330, bcrow@sftc.org (514)

Alisha Burgin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Adobe Inc. and TubeMogul, Inc.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Liquidus Marketing , Inc.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $1,730,472.79
Pre-Judgment Interest: $80,191.98
Attorney's Fees: $22,626.00
Costs: $893.63
Total Judgment in the amount of $1,834,184.40
Judgment signed in open court.
